nodes.title: 🐍 Prompt Preview
widgets_values:
A woman is positioned on her hands and knees on a bed of white sand, facing slightly left but turning her head to look directly at the viewer. She is in a low, crouched stance with her knees bent and resting on the ground behind her. Her weight is distributed evenly between her hands and knees. Her upper body displays visible muscle tension, particularly in her shoulders, triceps, and forearms as she supports her weight. Her core is engaged, creating a defined waistline and a curved, hourglass silhouette. Her skin is a deep, tan tone and is glistening with moisture, likely from the ocean spray or perspiration, with fine grains of sand adhering to her skin and swimsuit.

She wears a two-piece, bright orange bikini. The top is a triangle style with a small, silver-colored metal clasp at the center of her sternum. The bottoms are a thong style with side ties, sitting low on her hips. Her hair is a dirty blonde color, styled in a messy, voluminous high bun with loose strands framing her face. She wears dark, round sunglasses that obscure her eyes. Her facial expression is neutral and focused, with her lips slightly parted.

The background features the ocean, with turquoise water and white foam from the waves behind her. The lighting is bright and natural, casting soft shadows and highlighting the contours of her body.

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values: Image Size / Seed --- the image size is set here BUT when loading an image without using the Resize Image group. - the size in the preprocessor don't match for controlnets, but it is reduced to 1mp anyways before sending it to pp and the controlnet. - i2i (denoise) uses the input image as source and also it's resolution. - the image size doesn't matter when loading the image for the description only (image to prompt) when using the option configure_latent in the SmartLoader+ or Smart Model Loader - the latent size changes accordingly to what is used there (overwrites smart folder size and resize size). Seed - the seed is not used in the flow keep it disabled or fixed. otherwise the workflow starts from here everytime.

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values:
Enable this Group when using ControlNets

---

when using the [Flux Depth Lora](https://civitai.com/models/970050/flux-tools-depth-lora) / [Flux Canny Lora](https://civitai.com/models/970090?modelVersionId=1086214)

- use one of the Load Image groups
- use this group 
- enable i2i (Flux Preproc) option in the initial render group.

```
│          └── Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union.safetensors
```

nodes.title: Model Links (Qwen DiffSynth)
widgets_values:
[Tutorial](https://docs.comfy.org/tutorials/image/qwen/qwen-image) 


## Model links

You can find all the models on [Huggingface](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/tree/main) or [Modelscope](https://modelscope.cn/models/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/files)

**Diffusion model**

- [qwen_image_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/qwen_image_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors)

**Model patches**

- [qwen_image_canny_diffsynth_controlnet.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-DiffSynth-ControlNets/resolve/main/split_files/model_patches/qwen_image_canny_diffsynth_controlnet.safetensors)
- [qwen_image_depth_diffsynth_controlnet.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-DiffSynth-ControlNets/resolve/main/split_files/model_patches/qwen_image_depth_diffsynth_controlnet.safetensors)
- [qwen_image_inpaint_diffsynth_controlnet.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-DiffSynth-ControlNets/resolve/main/split_files/model_patches/qwen_image_inpaint_diffsynth_controlnet.safetensors)

**LoRA**

- [Qwen-Image-Lightning-4steps-V1.0.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Lightning/resolve/main/Qwen-Image-Lightning-4steps-V1.0.safetensors)

**Text encoder**

- [qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors)

**VAE**

- [qwen_image_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/vae/qwen_image_vae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   ├── qwen_image_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors
│   │   └── qwen_image_distill_full_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │   └── Qwen-Image-Lightning-8steps-V1.0.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 model_patches/ # create one if you can't find it
│   │   ├── qwen_image_depth_diffsynth_controlnet.safetensors
│   │   ├── qwen_image_canny_diffsynth_controlnet.safetensors
│   │   └── qwen_image_inpaint_diffsynth_controlnet.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │   └── qwen_image_vae.safetensors
│   └── 📂 text_encoders/
│       └── qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors
```


KSampler Settings:

You can test and find the best setting by yourself. The following table is for reference.

| model            | steps | cfg |
|---------------------|---------------|---------------|
| fp8_e4m3fn             | 20                | 2.5               |
| fp8_e4m3fn + 4 Steps lightning LoRA    | 4               | 1.0               |

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values: Enable one of the Load Image groups and use the preprocessor group. --- Standard ControlNets - set Standard to active in the Fast Muter and select the controlnet model that fits your checkpoint (SD15/SDXL/SD3/Flux) --- Union Models - activate Union Types (this enables the standard loader automaticly), select the Union ControlNet Model. --- Diffsynth: Qwen Image / Z-Image Turbo: - set everything in the Fast Mode Switcher to mute and activate DiffSynth: Qwen / ZIT. - activate i2i (DiffSynth: Qwen / ZIT) in the initial render group. (seems to also work without it because the model is patched) - don't forget the change the model in the Model Patch Loader (Z-Image / Qwen). --- for flux, i wouldn't recommend using controlnets. instead, i would use the loras, because they use less memory. [Flux Depth Lora](https://civitai.com/models/970050/flux-tools-depth-lora) / [Flux Canny Lora](https://civitai.com/models/970090?modelVersionId=1086214) leave the denoise in the initial render group at 1.0 to use the controlnet only.

| end           | 0.80 |
| bias          | 0.50 |
| exponent      | 1,0  |
| start offset  | 0,00 |

| fade          | 0 |
